title: Need VPN access for remote work
description: I'm starting remote work next week and need VPN credentials to access the company network from home.

title: Production database is down
description: Our main production database is completely unresponsive. All customer-facing services are offline. This is affecting thousands of users.

title: Laptop screen cracked
description: I dropped my laptop and the screen is cracked. I can still use it with an external monitor but would like a replacement.

title: Install Slack on my machine
description: Can someone help me install Slack? I need it for team communication.

title: Suspicious login attempts on my account
description: I received multiple alerts about failed login attempts from an IP address in Russia. I'm concerned my account may be compromised.

title: Need AWS S3 bucket for new project
description: Our team is starting a new data analytics project and we need an S3 bucket provisioned with appropriate IAM permissions.

title: WiFi not working in conference room B
description: The WiFi in conference room B on the 3rd floor is not working. We have a client meeting in 2 hours.

title: Request admin access to production servers
description: I need sudo access to the production web servers to deploy a critical hotfix.

title: Printer out of toner
description: The printer on the 2nd floor is out of toner. Can someone replace it?

title: Microsoft Office license expired
description: My Office 365 license expired and I can't open any Word or Excel files. I need this for my work today.

title: Set up new employee workstation
description: We have a new developer starting Monday. Need laptop, monitors, keyboard, mouse, and all standard software installed.

title: API gateway returning 500 errors
description: Our API gateway has been returning 500 errors for the past 15 minutes. Multiple customers are reporting issues.

title: Reset my password
description: I forgot my password and can't log in. Can you reset it for me?

title: Upgrade Python version on dev servers
description: We need to upgrade Python from 3.9 to 3.12 on all development servers for a new project.

title: VPN connection keeps dropping
description: My VPN connection drops every 10-15 minutes. It's making it impossible to work remotely.

title: Request access to HR database
description: I need read access to the HR database for a reporting project I'm working on.

title: Keyboard keys sticking
description: Several keys on my keyboard are sticking. It's annoying but I can still work.

title: Install Docker on my laptop
description: I need Docker installed on my development laptop for containerized testing.

title: Firewall blocking legitimate traffic
description: Our firewall is blocking traffic from a new partner's IP range. We need to whitelist them urgently.

title: Increase EC2 instance size
description: Our main application server is running out of memory. Need to upgrade from t3.medium to t3.large.

title: Mouse not working
description: My wireless mouse stopped working. I tried changing batteries but no luck.

title: Zoom keeps crashing during meetings
description: Zoom crashes every time I try to join a meeting. Very frustrating.

title: SSL certificate expiring soon
description: Our main website SSL certificate expires in 3 days. Need to renew it ASAP.

title: Need GitHub organization access
description: I'm a new developer and need to be added to the company GitHub organization.

title: Monitor flickering
description: My second monitor keeps flickering. It's giving me a headache.

title: Update antivirus definitions
description: Antivirus software is showing outdated definitions. Can this be updated?

title: Internet speed very slow
description: Internet connection is extremely slow today. Downloads that normally take seconds are taking minutes.

title: Lambda function timeout errors
description: Our data processing Lambda is timing out after 15 minutes. Need to increase timeout or optimize code.

title: Request elevated privileges for deployment
description: I need temporary elevated privileges to deploy the new release to production tonight.

title: Headset microphone not working
description: My headset microphone isn't working in Teams calls. People can't hear me.
